packages.overview:
Dubai, a dazzling jewel of the UAE, offers a one-of-a-kind adventure where futuristic ambition meets timeless tradition. With Travelxploria, embark on a journey to a city where the sky is the limit and the golden sands below whisper stories of ancient cultures.

From the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest tower, to the sprawling Palm Jumeirah, a marvel crafted from the sea, Dubai redefines modern architecture. Stroll through the luxurious Dubai Mall, shop for treasures in bustling souks, or indulge in world-class dining with views that stretch across the desert. Every corner of the city tells a tale of innovation and heritage.

As the sun sets, sail the serene waters of the Dubai Marina, or take a thrilling desert safari across the golden dunes—an adventure that brings together the city’s vibrant energy and tranquil beauty. Whether you’re enjoying the elegance of the city’s skyscrapers or the warmth of its desert, Dubai offers a playground of endless wonder, adventure, and luxury.

At Travelxploria, we curate experiences that blend culture, comfort, and excitement, ensuring your Dubai adventure is unforgettable. Let’s fly to your dream destination—where the future and tradition collide in dazzling Dubai.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for a magical evening. Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready to elevate your Dubai experience with a visit to Sky Glass Dubai, an architectural marvel offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city's futuristic skyline. Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless journey, making sure you enjoy every moment of this exhilarating attraction. Walk across the transparent glass floor, feeling the thrill of floating above the city, while taking in unmatched views of Dubai’s iconic landmarks.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

After a delicious breakfast, step into the future with an awe-inspiring visit to the Museum of the Future, Dubai’s architectural and technological marvel! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience. With your admission ticket included, enter a world of cutting-edge innovation, space exploration, AI-driven exhibits, and futuristic concepts that redefine what’s possible. Walk through immersive displays that transport you to the year 2071, where technology, sustainability, and human potential come to life. Explore interactive exhibits on robotics, health, and smart cities, offering a glimpse into tomorrow’s world. Whether you’re fascinated by artificial intelligence or dreaming of space travel, this experience will ignite your imagination. After an enlightening journey through the future, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
Discover Dubai with Travelxploria – Where Innovation Meets Tradition

Dubai is a city where innovation and heritage blend seamlessly, creating a destination like no other. With Travelxploria, explore a world where every towering skyscraper reflects ambition, and every quiet souk echoes with the richness of Arabian culture. From the glittering heights of the Burj Khalifa to the golden silence of the desert dunes, every corner of Dubai tells a story worth experiencing.

Marvel at futuristic architecture, indulge in world-class dining, and lose yourself in vibrant traditions that span centuries. Shop in ultra-modern malls by day, then wander spice-scented alleys by evening. Cruise the Dubai Marina at sunset, dine under the stars in a Bedouin-style camp, and wake to breathtaking sunrises over the Arabian Gulf.

At Travelxploria, we believe travel should be more than sightseeing—it should be storytelling. And in Dubai, the story is one of vision, culture, and unforgettable wonder.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—and let Dubai leave you inspired.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

As the sun sets over Dubai, get ready for a mesmerizing experience at the world-famous Fountain Show. Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up and ensure a seamless journey to this breathtaking spectacle. Watch in awe as water dances to rhythmic melodies, illuminated by dazzling lights, creating a magical display against the stunning city skyline. Feel the enchanting atmosphere as music, lights, and water come together in perfect harmony. After an unforgettable evening, our representative will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with memories of Dubai’s most iconic performance.

End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.


Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Dubai City Tour – Explore iconic landmarks like the Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah, and Al Fahidi Historical District.

  • Desert Safari Adventure – Experience thrilling dune bashing, camel rides, and a BBQ dinner with entertainment under the stars.

  • Luxury & Leisure – Enjoy a Marina Dhow Cruise with dinner, indulge in shopping, or relax on Dubai’s stunning beaches.

  • Abu Dhabi Excursion – Visit the magnificent Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Emirates Palace, and explore Ferrari World for adventure.

As you land at Dubai International Airport, a world of luxury and adventure awaits. Our dedicated Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel. As you drive past the city's iconic skyline, marvel at the futuristic architecture and vibrant energy of Dubai. Upon arrival at your hotel, check-in and unwind in comfort, soaking in the excitement of the journey ahead.

Experience Dubai in ultimate style with a luxurious limousine tour, tailored to your preferred timing, be it a daytime city cruise or a glamorous night ride. Your Travelxploria representative and guide will ensure a smooth experience, with a pick-up from your hotel in a high end limousine, setting the tone for an extravagant journey. Sink into plush leather seats, enjoy ambient lighting, and sip on refreshing beverages as you glide past Dubai’s most iconic landmarks—Burj Khalifa, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and Jumeirah Beach Road. Whether celebrating a special occasion, enjoying a VIP experience, or just indulging in luxury, this ride offers unforgettable moments. Capture stunning photos at picturesque stops before arriving back at your hotel, where your chauffeur will drop you off in true celebrity fashion.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Whether you want a sunrise getaway, a midday adventure, or a breathtaking sunset cruise, set sail on a luxurious yacht at the preference of the guest. After picking you up from your hotel, your Travelxploria representative will make the easy transition to the marina, where your private or shared yacht is waiting for you. Pass famous sites like the Burj Al Arab, Atlantis the Palm, and the stunning Dubai Marina skyline as you glide across the Arabian Gulf's glittering waters. Savour cool beverages, unwind on the sun deck, and take in the expansive views of the coast. This yacht experience offers luxury activities, whether you're looking for a romantic retreat, a fun family outing, or a wild celebration you can enjoy all. We'll make sure you have a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

World","day_summary":"

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a world of fantasy, adventure, and nostalgia at Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi, the world’s largest indoor theme park, where your favorite characters come to life! Your Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel for a comfortable drive to Yas Island, where an action-packed day awaits. With your entry ticket included, explore six immersive lands, from the bustling streets of Gotham City and Metropolis to the whimsical world of Cartoon Junction and Bedrock. Meet Batman, Superman, Bugs Bunny, and Scooby-Doo, enjoy thrilling rides, and step into live entertainment shows filled with movie magic. Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

packages.overview: Touch down in Dubai and let Travelxploria transform your journey into seamless luxury: begin with a private Dubai city tour—exploring the historic Al Fahidi Quarter, fragrant spice and gold souks, and the futuristic marvels of Downtown—before whisking you to Abu Dhabi’s cultural crown jewels, the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque and Louvre Abu Dhabi with VIP entry. Return to Dubai for an exhilarating desert safari: dune-bashing in 4×4 jeeps, a sunset camel trek and a Bedouin-style barbecue under starlit skies complete with traditional music and falconry displays. The next day, ascend to the clouds with fast-track access to the Burj Khalifa’s 124th-floor observation deck, then unwind on a sunset cruise through the twinkling waters of Dubai Marina aboard a luxury dhow, complete with gourmet canapés and chilled refreshments. Every detail—from expert guides and exclusive skip-the-line privileges to personalized concierge touches—is artfully arranged by Travelxploria so you can savor every moment of your Arabian adventure without a single worry.

As you arrive at Dubai International Airport, the gateway to luxury and adventure, a warm welcome awaits you from our dedicated Travelxploria representative. From the moment you step into this vibrant city, our team ensures a seamless experience with personalized assistance and smooth transfers. Sit back and relax as you journey through the dazzling skyline to your carefully chosen hotel. Whether you wish to unwind or explore, Dubai’s charm is ready to captivate you. With Travelxploria’s best-in-class service, your dream vacation begins the moment you land, setting the stage for an unforgettable journey in this magnificent destination.

Welcome to Dubai! After settling in at your hotel, get ready for a magical evening. Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will pick you up and guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

packages.overview:
Dubai: Where Tradition Meets Tomorrow
Dubai is a city where tradition and innovation intertwine to create a mesmerizing blend of past and future. Here, soaring skyscrapers stand beside bustling souks, and luxury coexists effortlessly with cultural heritage. From the golden sands of its vast deserts to awe-inspiring, futuristic landmarks, every corner of Dubai tells a story of ambition, elegance, and resilience. Wander through vibrant markets, unwind on sun-kissed beaches, or indulge in world-class dining and entertainment—each moment curated to perfection. With Travelxploria guiding your journey, Dubai becomes more than just a destination—it’s a promise of unforgettable memories, endless possibilities, and experiences that transcend the ordinary.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Prepare for an embarking trip on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for a magical evening. Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will pick you up and guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

packages.overview: Beneath an endless sky of burnished gold, Travelxploria unveils Dubai’s dual soul: a city where timeless sands meet next-gen marvels. You’ll glide from a secret rooftop in Al Fahidi, sampling spicy qahwa as wind chimes tinkle in a courtyard draped with lantern light, straight into a high-speed yacht carving the glittering Creek. In one afternoon, you’ll haggle for rose-scented oud in the spice souk, then step into a hidden gallery for a private showcase of Emirati street art. When the dunes call, Travelxploria’s Bedouin hosts await with falcon-on-fist demonstrations, tactile carpet-weaving lessons, and a feast of slow-roasted lamb under a canopy of stars. And just when you think you’ve seen every angle, we’ll whisk you atop a glass-edged skybridge, where the city’s vertical symphony shimmers below—and you realize Dubai, through Travelxploria’s lens, is as much a feeling as it is a destination.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia's arts and cultural capital.
  • Discover stunning wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade tour.
  • Explore the iconic Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s scenic coastal wonders.
  • Depart Melbourne with a seamless shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in tropical Cairns and prepare for nature-filled adventures.
  • Journey through ancient rainforests via Skyrail & Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Cruise to Green Island for a full day on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart from Cairns with a smooth shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and dive into sun, surf, and excitement.
  • Enjoy Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds Pass.​
  • Depart Gold Coast with a comfortable shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a Big Bus hop-on hop-off pass and Merlin Attractions.
  • Embark on a full-day Blue Mountains adventure through nature and history.
  • Depart from Sydney, bringing home unforgettable memories of Australia.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Kathmandu International Airport with hotel transfer and welcome soft drink; leisure time and overnight stay in Kathmandu.
  • Breakfast followed by full-day Kathmandu sightseeing: Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Pokhara via Manakamana Temple; welcome soft drink, leisure time, and overnight stay in Pokhara.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Pokhara covering Bindabashini Temple, Gupteshor Cave, Devi’s Fall, Seti River, Fewa Lake, and Peace Pagoda; leisure time and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, drive to Chitwan; welcome drink, lunch, village tour, Tharu culture dance, leisure time, dinner, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast, bird watching, elephant safari, jungle walk, canoeing; meals and overnight stay in Chitwan.
  • Breakfast, drive back to Kathmandu; welcome drink, leisure time, and overnight stay.
  • Breakfast and transfer from hotel to Kathmandu International Airport for departure.

Spend a comfortable overnight stay at your hotel in Kathmandu, beginning your unforgettable Nepal journey with ease and comfort.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a full-day sightseeing tour of Kathmandu’s most iconic landmarks. Visit the sacred Pashupatinath Temple, one of the holiest Hindu sites, followed by a trip to the magnificent Boudhanath Stupa, a revered center of Buddhist worship. Next, explore the famous Swayambhunath Stupa, also known as the Monkey Temple, which offers stunning panoramic views of the city. Conclude your cultural journey at the historic Kathmandu Durbar Square, rich with ancient architecture and heritage. After the tour, enjoy free time to relax or explore at your leisure. Overnight stay at the hotel in Kathmandu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Pokhara","country":"Nepal","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041086666-AdobeStock_311461036-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087540-AdobeStock_341652665-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087662-AdobeStock_366915671-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Nepal/Pokhara/1747041087746-AdobeStock_545470493-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer from Kathmandu to Pokhara","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel before departing Kathmandu for Pokhara. En route, visit the sacred Manakamana Temple, accessible by a scenic cable car ride, where you can seek blessings and admire the stunning surroundings. After the temple visit, continue your journey to Pokhara, a picturesque city nestled beside serene lakes and majestic mountains, covering approximately 210 kilometers in 7 to 8 hours. Upon arrival, our TravelXploria representative will welcome you with a refreshing soft drink at your hotel. The rest of the day is yours to relax and enjoy at your leisure. Overnight stay in Pokhara.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a full-day sightseeing tour of Pokhara. Visit the revered Bindabashini Temple, an important religious site dedicated to the goddess Durga. Explore the mysterious Gupteshor Cave, followed by the breathtaking Devi’s Fall, where water cascades dramatically into a deep gorge. Continue to the serene Seti River and take in the tranquil beauty of Fewa Lake, perfect for relaxation and boating. End your tour at the Peace Pagoda, offering panoramic views of Pokhara and the surrounding Himalayan peaks. Enjoy leisure time afterward. Overnight stay at the hotel in Pokhara.

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel before departing for Chitwan, a scenic 145 km drive taking approximately 5 to 6 hours. Upon arrival, you will be warmly welcomed with a refreshing soft drink and transferred to your hotel. Enjoy a delicious lunch at the hotel before setting out on a cultural village tour to experience the vibrant local life. In the evening, immerse yourself in the traditional Tharu Culture Dance Program, showcasing the rich heritage of the region. After some free leisure time to relax, savor a delightful dinner at the hotel. Overnight stay will be arranged in Chitwan.

Start your day with a wholesome breakfast at the hotel, preparing for an exciting day filled with nature and adventure. Engage in bird watching to spot the diverse and colorful species inhabiting the region. Experience the thrill of an elephant safari, exploring the jungle from the back of these majestic creatures. Take a refreshing jungle walk to immerse yourself in the wilderness, followed by a serene canoeing trip along the river, surrounded by stunning landscapes. After these activities, enjoy some free leisure time to relax. Lunch and dinner will be served at the hotel. Overnight stay is arranged in Chitwan.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel before embarking on a scenic drive from Chitwan to Kathmandu, covering approximately 165 kilometers over 5 to 6 hours. Upon arrival in Kathmandu, you will be warmly welcomed with a refreshing soft drink at your hotel, providing a perfect way to unwind after the journey. The rest of the day is yours to enjoy at leisure—whether you choose to explore the vibrant city streets, relax at the hotel, or indulge in some local shopping. An overnight stay will be arranged at a comfortable hotel in Kathmandu.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne and begin your Australian adventure.
  • Experience wildlife and the famous Penguin Parade on Phillip Island.
  • Discover the stunning Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s Surf Coast.
  • Transfer from Melbourne to the airport and fly to the Gold Coast.
  • Enjoy thrilling fun at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Depart the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a 24-hour Big Bus hop-on-hop-off pass and visit four top attractions.
  • Take a full-day tour of the breathtaking Blue Mountains.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home wonderful memories of Australia.​

Enjoy a stress-free arrival as our Travelxploria representative warmly welcomes you at the airport and escorts you to your 4-star hotel in Melbourne’s Central Business District, where a comfortable stay with breakfast included awaits you.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.package_name: Wonders of Vietnam: From Saigon to Sapa
packages.overview:
Explore Vietnam with Travelxploria – A Journey Through Culture, Nature & Timeless Charm

Vietnam is a land where every landscape tells a story and every street hums with life. With Travelxploria, discover a Southeast Asian gem known for its breathtaking natural wonders, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to the emerald rice terraces of Sapa and the tranquil shores of Da Nang, Vietnam’s beauty unfolds in every direction.

Step back in time as you explore ancient temples, French colonial avenues, and poignant war-era landmarks—each offering insight into a nation shaped by resilience and heritage. In the dynamic cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh, tradition meets modernity, where bustling street markets, motorbike-packed avenues, and rooftop cafes coexist in perfect harmony.

And of course, no journey is complete without tasting Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine—bursting with fresh herbs, bold flavors, and stories in every dish. From warm smiles to cultural riches, Vietnam welcomes you with open arms.

Let’s fly to your dream destination—with Travelxploria, your Vietnam adventure awaits.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh & Half Day City Tour ","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with our driver, will pick you up at your hotel to begin the Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Upon arrival, you will watch a documentary film revealing the mystery behind the Cu Chi Tunnels, showcasing how they were constructed and how locals survived in harsh wartime conditions. Explore the intricate tunnel system, designed to withstand powerful bomb attacks, and discover Hoang Cam's smoke-less stove, secret hideouts, fighting bunkers, and dangerous booby traps. You will also visit a rice paper workshop and taste special tea and cassava, the staple food of guerrilla fighters during the war. Take a break and, if you wish, try shooting Vietnam War-era weapons like the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 light machine gun. After finishing the tour, the bus will take you back to your hotel. Later, our private driver will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Upon arrival, our representative will be there to pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before starting your adventure with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. At 08:30, our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you’ll take a breathtaking cable car ride to the summit, admiring panoramic views along the way. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden featuring a variety of vibrant blooms. Next, take another cable car ride to the enchanting French Village, situated at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its unique European-style architecture. In the afternoon, enjoy thrilling games at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most attractions, including a 4D movie experience, are included in the tour package. However, certain games with rewards may require an additional fee. After an exciting day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative and driver will warmly welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

8:30 AM: After a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and driver will take you to the Cable Car Station, where you will enjoy a breathtaking 20-minute cable car ride with spectacular mountain scenery. 9:30 AM: Arriving at an altitude of 2,800 meters, take in the panoramic views, visit the spiritual pagoda, and trek up 600 steps to reach the peak of Fansipan – the Roof of Indochina. Spend approximately 1.5 hours hiking and capturing stunning photographs. 12:00 PM: Return to the Cable Car Station and head back to Sapa town, where the rest of the day is yours to explore at leisure. For an unforgettable cultural experience, we highly recommend visiting the Love Market on Saturday night, a unique gathering of ethnic minorities such as the H’mong and Dao people, showcasing the rich traditions of Lao Cai and Northwest Vietnam. Stay overnight at Sapa Relax Hotel, ensuring a comfortable and restful night.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating Southeast Asian country celebrated for its breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to Sapa’s terraced rice fields and Da Nang’s serene beaches, its natural beauty is truly mesmerizing. The country’s history comes alive through ancient temples, French colonial architecture, and war-era landmarks. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City blend tradition with modern energy, featuring lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam offers an unforgettable experience.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 8:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up for an exciting city tour. Begin with a visit to Linh Ung Pagoda and the majestic Marble Mountains before driving to Hoi An for a delightful lunch. In the afternoon, experience a unique basket boat ride at Bay Mau Palm Garden, followed by an exploration of Hoi An Ancient Town, a historic international trading port from the 16th century. Discover iconic sites like the Japanese Covered Bridge, Fujian Assembly Hall, Tan Ky Old House, and Hoi An Central Market. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Hoi An before returning to your hotel in Da Nang for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":246,"a_name":"Da Nang Arrival + Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Da Nang","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. 08:30 AM: Our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you will take a scenic cable car ride to the summit, enjoying breathtaking panoramic views. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After an exciting day, take the cable car back down and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival in Ho Chi Minh City, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, and our private driver will transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you in the lobby and accompany you on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. This intricate 200km-long tunnel network served as a vital shelter for guerrillas during the war against American troops and stands as a remarkable testament to human resilience and ingenuity. Explore this historical site and gain insights into Vietnam’s wartime past before returning to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy your free time until the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your departure flight home, concluding your memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":244,"a_name":"Cu Chi Tunnel Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Ho Chi Minh","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":"[\"null\"]","a_details":"

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a breathtaking Southeast Asian destination known for its stunning landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone formations of Halong Bay to the terraced rice fields of Sapa and the pristine beaches of Da Nang, its natural beauty is truly captivating. The country’s deep heritage is showcased through its ancient temples, colonial-era landmarks, and historic war sites. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City seamlessly blend tradition with modern energy, offering lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam promises an unforgettable travel experience.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Upon landing, our Travelxploria representative will welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. 08:30 AM: Our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you will take a scenic cable car ride to the summit, enjoying breathtaking panoramic views. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After an exciting day, take the cable car back down and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival in Ho Chi Minh City, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, and our private driver will transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, your Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you at the hotel lobby. Embark on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels, an extensive underground network stretching over 200 km, which once served as a shelter and strategic base for guerrilla fighters during the war against American troops. Explore the tunnels and gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s wartime history. In the afternoon, continue with a guided city tour, visiting the War Remnants Museum, where historical exhibits provide insight into the country’s resilience. Then, admire the stunning architecture of Notre Dame Cathedral and the Central Post Office, both iconic landmarks of Ho Chi Minh City. Conclude the day with a visit to the bustling Ben Thanh Market, one of the city’s most vibrant shopping hubs.

packages.overview: Picture dawn’s first light casting a golden glow over Ha Long Bay’s towering karsts as you drift through mist-kissed waters with Travelxploria, the air alive with birdsong and whispered legends of ancient mariners. By midday, you’re trekking along Sapa’s emerald terraces—each step revealing a new vista of sculpted rice paddies and hillside villages where time-honored traditions still shape every basket and loom under Travelxploria’s expert guidance. As the sun dips low, Da Nang’s white-sand beaches beckon—you sink your toes into warm, powdery shores before savoring a bowl of fragrant pho at a beachside stall, its steam rising like a promise of tomorrow’s adventures curated by Travelxploria. In Hanoi’s winding alleys, the clatter of motorbikes fades into the aroma of fresh herbs and sizzling banh mi, while in Ho Chi Minh City, neon lights dance off colonial facades, inviting you into night markets pulsing with life. Everywhere you wander, ancient pagodas stand sentinel over modern boulevards, and warm smiles remind you that Vietnam’s true luxury is its people. This is a land where history breathes in every stone and nature dazzles at every turn—Travelxploria’s invitation to have your story waiting to be written.

[{"city":"Hanoi","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hanoi/1740928929711-1740906563685-hanoi-vietnam-6915207_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hanoi/1740928930264-1740906563804-pagoda-7136024_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hanoi/1740928930364-1740906563863-silver-ringvee-niFWqrLdjlE-unsplash.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Hanoi Arrival","day_summary":"

Welcome to Hanoi – the vibrant capital of Vietnam! Upon your arrival at Noi Bai Airport, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with the driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 35-minute drive to the heart of Hanoi, where you will witness the city's charming blend of historical and modern architecture. Upon reaching your hotel, our guide will assist with the check-in process and provide insights into the city’s must-visit attractions. Take some time to relax and unwind after your journey. Please note: Standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to the hotel's availability.

Welcome to Hanoi – the vibrant capital of Vietnam! Upon your arrival at Noi Bai Airport, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with the driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 35-minute drive to the heart of Hanoi, where you will witness the city's charming blend of historical and modern architecture. Upon reaching your hotel, our guide will assist with the check-in process and provide insights into the city’s must-visit attractions. Take some time to relax and unwind after your journey.
