Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an enriching journey through Hanoi with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. 8:30 AM: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and take you to the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ho Chi Minh’s Mausoleum, the final resting place of the beloved national hero, Uncle Ho. Explore President Ho Chi Minh’s stilt house, where he lived intermittently from 1958 to 1969, and gain insights into his life at the Ho Chi Minh Museum. 9:30 AM: Next, visit the iconic One Pillar Pagoda, an architectural marvel built over water in the middle of a square lake. Then, journey to the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, beautifully situated on the shores of West Lake. Continue to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first university, dedicated to Confucius and a symbol of the nation’s scholarly heritage. Later, visit the tranquil Hoan Kiem Lake, often referred to as the heart and soul of Hanoi, before heading to the Museum of Ethnology. Here, you will explore Vietnam’s rich cultural diversity through an extensive collection of 15,000 artifacts, detailed dioramas, and interactive displays. Our experienced guide will provide fascinating insights into ethnic traditions, the making of traditional conical hats, and the customs of indigenous tribes. Don’t miss the opportunity to visit a reconstructed Black Thai house and witness the meticulous research conducted by scientists worldwide on traditional Vietnamese cultures. This immersive tour, led by Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensures a deep understanding of Hanoi’s history, culture, and heritage.

In the morning, embark on a half-day city tour accompanied by a Representative of Travelxploria. Your first stop will be the Ho Chi Minh Complex, which includes Ba Dinh Square, the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays; however, you can still view the building from the outside), a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (view from outside), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the famous One Pillar Pagoda. Next, visit the Temple of Literature, where Confucius, the founder of Confucianism, is worshiped. This historic site also served as Vietnam’s first National University, where many kings, mandarins, and scholars were trained. In the afternoon, enjoy a 3.5-hour scenic drive to Halong Bay, passing through the picturesque Red River Delta countryside with a short break along the way.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a boat tour to Luon Cave, a breathtaking ring-shaped pool nestled within an island in Halong Bay, where you will be surrounded by an absolutely tranquil landscape and emerald waters. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will enrich your journey with fascinating insights into the area’s natural wonders. Cruise back to Halong Wharf, passing through the most densely clustered islands, including the famous Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock, each uniquely shaped by nature’s artistry. Arrive at Halong Wharf around 11:00 AM, then begin your scenic return journey to Hanoi, reaching the city around 4:00 PM. Upon arrival, our private driver, accompanied by Travelxploria’s experienced guide, will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Once you land in Ho Chi Minh, you will be warmly welcomed by our representative, who will ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, allowing you to settle in and relax.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Beneath emerald rice terraces and mist-shrouded peaks, Travelxploria reveals Vietnam’s soul in a single, seamless journey. You’ll drift into Halong Bay aboard an intimate wooden junk, lanterns glowing as towering karsts rise like ancient sentinels from glassy waters. By dawn, a cyclo awaits to carry you through Hanoi’s labyrinthine alleys, where the scent of sizzling bánh mì mingles with the chatter of morning markets. In the heart of the city, our local scholar guides you through hidden courtyards of the Temple of Literature, whispering tales of emperors and poets. Then, trading urban rhythm for mountain serenity, Travelxploria transports you to Sapa’s remote highlands—share jasmine tea with H’mông villagers and learn their time-honored weaving craft beneath starlit skies. Finally, in Saigon’s electric embrace, rooftop cocktails toast against neon skyscrapers, and an evening street-food expedition unveils the spicy harmony of nước sâm and bánh xèo. Throughout every moment, from private limousines to handpicked boutique hideaways and heartfelt encounters, Travelxploria curates an odyssey that blends Vietnam’s storied past with its vibrant present—leaving you spellbound and yearning to return.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

Begin your day in Hanoi with a warm greeting from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, set off on a scenic drive to Ha Long Bay, where emerald waters and towering limestone karsts await. Board a luxury cruise and sail through this UNESCO World Heritage Site, marveling at breathtaking landscapes while enjoying a freshly prepared seafood lunch onboard. Explore hidden caves, kayak through tranquil waters, or simply relax on the sundeck as nature’s beauty unfolds around you. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures everything runs smoothly, from comfortable transfers to personalized assistance. As the cruise concludes, Travelxploria guarantees a hassle-free return to Hanoi, allowing you to unwind and reflect on an unforgettable day. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, your Ha Long Bay experience is nothing short of magical.

After a hearty breakfast, bid farewell to the bustling streets of Hanoi as you board a domestic flight to the serene tropical island of Phu Quoc, known for its crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and lush greenery. Upon arrival, you’ll be warmly greeted and transferred to your beachside resort, where you can relax and soak in the tranquil vibes of this island paradise. The rest of the day is at your leisure—perfect for unwinding by the pool, strolling along the pristine shoreline, or enjoying a refreshing drink as you watch the waves roll in. You may also choose to indulge in a soothing spa treatment or sample fresh seafood at a beachfront restaurant. Whether you’re looking to relax and recharge or explore the nearby markets and beach bars, this free day offers the perfect balance of calm and charm to ease into the tropical pace of Phu Quoc.

With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, hop aboard a speedboat and set off toward the island’s most stunning coral reefs. Feel the thrill as you dive into crystal-clear waters, exploring vibrant marine life beneath the surface. Our best on-ground support staff ensures your comfort, providing high-quality snorkeling gear and expert guidance at every step. After a morning of underwater exploration, savor a delicious seafood lunch on a picturesque beach, soaking in the island’s tropical beauty. As the day winds down, relax on the boat ride back, knowing Travelxploria has taken care of every detail—from pick-up to drop-off. With seamless logistics and a touch of luxury, this unforgettable snorkeling experience is designed for pure adventure and relaxation. Let Travelxploria make your Phu Quoc dreams come true.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & Night Safari – Arrive in Singapore, check in, and experience the famous Night Safari.
  • Singapore City Tour & Gardens by the Bay – Explore Merlion Park, Chinatown, Marina Bay Sands, and visit Gardens by the Bay.
  • Universal Studios Adventure – Enjoy a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore with thrilling rides and attractions.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & City Tour – Travel to Kuala Lumpur and explore Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and Bukit Bintang.
  • Sunway Lagoon Theme Park – Experience water rides, amusement parks, and adventure zones at Sunway Lagoon.
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves – Visit the hill resort of Genting Highlands and explore the iconic Batu Caves.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Enjoy a relaxed morning before transferring to the airport for departure.

After checking in and Get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle for an exciting half-day city tour. Led by our expert guide, explore the city's top landmarks, including the iconic Merlion Park, the stunning Marina Bay Sands, and the vibrant streets of Little India and Chinatown. Capture breathtaking views at Gardens by the Bay and drive past the historic Padang and Parliament House. Immerse yourself in Singapore’s culture, history, and modern marvels. After an enriching tour, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore | Safari Tour or Bird Paradise
    Arrive in Singapore and visit either the Safari Tour with a tram ride or Bird Paradise for a wildlife experience.
  • Thrilling Universal Studios Adventure
    Spend a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore, enjoying exciting rides and shows.
  • Sentosa Island Exploration
    Visit Sentosa Island with a cable car ride, Madame Tussauds, S.E.A. Aquarium & the Wings of Time show.
  • Singapore City Tour
    Explore top Singapore landmarks, including Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, and Gardens by the Bay.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur
    Travel from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur and enjoy leisure time in the city.
  • Kuala Lumpur City Highlights
    Discover the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and vibrant local markets.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands
    Visit Batu Caves and take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands for entertainment and relaxation.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Return to Kuala Lumpur, enjoy last-minute shopping, and depart with wonderful memories.

Arrive in Singapore and get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Or

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the two-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria, beginning in dazzling Singapore where you’ll stroll through Marina Bay’s waterfront and wander the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. Feel the adrenaline rush at Universal Studios before returning to marvel at the Supertree Grove’s nightly light show. After a scenic city tour, board your luxury cruise for a day of laid-back onboard entertainment, then wake up to the sights of Kuala Lumpur—Tour the city’s landmarks, breathe in the cool mountain air at Genting Highlands, and explore the sacred Batu Caves and bustling local markets. Finally, Travelxploria wraps up your adventure with a seamless transfer and heartfelt farewell, leaving you with cherished memories of two vibrant countries.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A perfect blend of cultural heritage, lush greenery, and wildlife in Northeast India.

Guwahati: The gateway to Assam, known for the revered Kamakhya Temple, scenic Brahmaputra River cruises, and vibrant markets.

Shillong: The “Scotland of the East,” featuring scenic attractions like Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, and Ward’s Lake.

Mawsynram: The wettest place on Earth, famous for its misty landscapes, Mawjymbuin Cave, and lush green surroundings.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, home to the one-horned rhinoceros and thrilling jeep and elephant safaris.​

Witness the spectacular Nohkalikai Falls, where water tumbles from towering cliffs, creating a mesmerizing plunge pool. After exploring this natural masterpiece, return to Shillong with your heart full of wonder, the sound of cascading waters still echoing in your soul.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Shillong Unveiled","day_summary":"

Ascend to Shillong Peak,with the views of the city and misty hills captivate your soul. Capture the magic of the landscape as the clouds play hide-and-seek. As the evening sets in, explore the vibrant Police Bazar—a treasure trove of local delicacies, souvenirs, and street-side energy and experience the heartbeat of Shillong, where nature and culture come together in perfect harmony.

Begin your day with an enchanting elephant safari through Kaziranga’s dew-kissed grasslands. From your majestic point, witness the wilderness come alive—spotting rhinos grazing, herds of deer, and vibrant birdlife fluttering above. The soft morning sun and the rhythmic sway of your elephant create a serene connection with nature. After the adventure, indulge in a day of relaxation.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Shillong’s Last Goodbye","day_summary":"

Return to Shillong, the city where your journey filled with treasured memories. The winding roads and rolling hills seem to wave goodbye as you recount the thrills of Kaziranga and the wonders of Meghalaya. As you prepare for departure, savor the final moments of cool breezes and mountain charm. Though you leave, the melodies of waterfalls, forests, and the wilderness stay with you.


","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Kaziranga","to":"Guwahati Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

​Travel to Havelock Island by Cruise – Visit Radhanagar Beach Until Sunset
​Elephant Beach Boat Ride – Complimentary Snorkeling Experience

[{"city":"Port Blair","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786362-AdobeStock_321207750-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786862-AdobeStock_409203105-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Airport Pickup Later Corbyns Cove Beach and Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail","day_summary":"

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our Travelxploria representative will be waiting outside the airport, holding a placard with your name on it. You will be warmly welcomed and escorted to your hotel, where you can relax and unwind after your journey.

Later, we proceed to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, a stunning coastal destination. The 4 km scenic drive to this beach is truly mesmerizing, with the vast open sea on your left offering breathtaking views. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will ensure you have the best experience, guiding you to the most picturesque spots for photography and exploration.

As the evening sets in, we take you to witness the enchanting Sound and Light Show at Cellular Jail, where the valiant tales of India’s freedom struggle come alive. The gripping narration and reenactment of the sacrifices made by freedom fighters will leave you deeply moved.

After this immersive experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a smooth transfer back to your hotel, marking the perfect start to your Andaman adventure.

Blair To Havelock in Cruise. Later Radhanagar Beach visit Until Sunset","day_summary":"

Today, we set out to explore one of the most breathtaking destinations in the Andaman Islands – Havelock Island, renowned as the best island in India. We depart from Port Blair to Havelock Island on a comfortable ferry, enjoying the scenic journey across the azure waters.

Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will be there to welcome you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, where you can relax and refresh.

Later, we embark on a visit to the iconic Radhanagar Beach, ranked among Asia’s finest beaches. The soft, white sands, crystal-clear waters, and lush greenery make it a true paradise. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will provide insights into the beach’s beauty and assist you in capturing the best moments. Take your time to bask in the serenity, stroll along the shoreline, and witness a breathtaking sunset over the horizon.

After this mesmerizing experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will arrange a comfortable transfer back to your resort, where you can relax and unwind, cherishing the unforgettable memories of the day.

Spa/1742469897043-Symphony Palms Beach Resort And Spa 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Elephant Beach Boat Ride Tour and Complimentary Snorkelling with Hotel Pickup and Drop","day_summary":"

How about an unforgettable underwater adventure? Today, we set off on an exciting journey to Elephant Beach, the most popular snorkeling destination in Havelock Island. A scenic 30-minute boat ride takes us to this tropical paradise, home to one of the most stunning coral reefs in the region. What makes Elephant Beach unique is that the reef begins at a depth of less than a meter, making it perfect for both beginners and experienced snorkelers.

Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will assist you in settling in and enjoying the pristine surroundings. Take a moment to relax on the soft sands and soak in the breathtaking coastal beauty.

Next, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you to an exciting complimentary snorkeling session, where you get to witness the vibrant marine life up close (subject to association guidelines). Dive into the crystal-clear waters and experience the mesmerizing underwater world like never before!

After this thrilling experience, we board our boat and return to Havelock dock, where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be waiting to assist you with a seamless transfer back to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day unwinding and reflecting on the incredible moments from your snorkeling adventure.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Neil","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Neil/1744973218739-AdobeStock_199316275-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Neil/1744973219179-AdobeStock_327490432-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Neil/1744973219353-AdobeStock_355913509 (1).jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Havelock To Neil Island in Cruise Later Visit Laxmanpur Beach for Sunset","day_summary":"

Check out from your hotel in Havelock Island, and our Travelxploria representative will assist you in boarding a premium cruise to Neil Island, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey.

Upon arrival at Neil Island, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be there to greet you and escort you to your resort for check-in. Take some time to relax and refresh before we head out to explore the island’s natural beauty.

Later in the day, we proceed to the serene Laxmanpur Beach, a secluded paradise located 2 km north of Neil’s jetty. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, sharing fascinating insights about the island’s rich marine life and unspoiled landscapes.

As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in the breathtaking sunset views at Laxmanpur Beach, where the sky transforms into a palette of vibrant colors, creating a truly magical experience.

After soaking in the beauty of this tranquil setting, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a comfortable transfer back to your hotel, allowing you to unwind and prepare for another exciting day ahead.

Bharatpur Beach Trip Later Neil to Port Blair in Cruise and Hotel Drop","day_summary":"

Today, we embark on an exciting journey to explore the Natural Rock Formation, one of Neil Island’s most iconic attractions. This stunning natural wonder, also known as the Howrah Bridge, showcases the beauty of nature’s craftsmanship. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about the rock’s formation and its significance.

After this, we proceed to Bharatpur Beach, a paradise for water enthusiasts. Here, you can indulge in a variety of thrilling water activities, including Scuba Diving, Glass Bottom Boat Rides, and Jet Skiing, offering an up-close view of the vibrant marine life. If you prefer a more relaxed experience, take a refreshing swim in the crystal-clear waters or simply soak in the sun on the pristine shore. A variety of food options are available at the beach for you to savor some delicious local cuisine.

Once the adventure at Bharatpur Beach is complete, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a smooth transfer to Neil Jetty, where you will board a comfortable cruise to Port Blair.

Upon arrival at Port Blair, our Travelxploria representative will be there to welcome you and ensure a hassle-free transfer to your hotel for an overnight stay, allowing you to relax and unwind after an eventful day.

packages.overview:
• Shimla to Kufri Half Day Tour:
    Head out to Kufri, a quaint spot just outside Shimla known for its panoramic views, yak rides, and fun activities at the Kufri Fun World. Return to Shimla and enjoy the serene mountain evening.
  • Shimla to Sarahan:
    Drive through pine-clad hills and apple orchards to Sarahan, a peaceful village with stunning views of the snow-covered Himalayas. Visit the famous Bhimakali Temple, known for its unique architecture and spiritual vibe.
  • ​Tirthan Valley Full Day Tour:
    Explore the natural beauty of Tirthan with a visit to the Great Himalayan National Park, Jalori Pass, and Serolsar Lake. Enjoy short hikes, local village life, and the soothing sound of the river.​

packages.overview: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Travelxploria, touching down in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll be whisked to your hotel to unwind before diving into the city’s vibrant street life. Venture up to Genting Highlands for theme-park thrills, boutique shopping, and sweeping mountain vistas, then return to explore Kuala Lumpur’s cultural crown jewels—marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, ascend the sacred Batu Caves, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Next, cross into Singapore by air or road and discover the glittering waterfront of Marina Bay before delving into the city’s heart on a guided tour of Merlion Park, Chinatown, and other iconic landmarks. Cap off your adventure with heart-pounding rides and movie-magic attractions at Universal Studios Singapore, then savor final moments of shopping and relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your seamless departure home.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Phuket – Warm welcome by our Travelxploria representative with a seamless transfer to Krabi.

  • Krabi Exploration – Discover the stunning Four Islands, relax on pristine beaches, and explore the Krabi Rainforest with a dip in the Emerald Pool and hot springs, followed by a delicious Thai lunch.

  • Transfer to Phuket – Enjoy a comfortable road journey with breathtaking coastal views.

  • Phuket Highlights – Visit Phi Phi Islands, explore the vibrant nightlife, and indulge in local cuisine.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.package_name: Discover the Best of Kuala Lumpur and Malacca
packages.overview:
Explore the Best of Kuala Lumpur and Malacca with Travelxploria

Embark on a vibrant journey with Travelxploria as you uncover the diverse charm of Kuala Lumpur and the historic wonders of Malacca. Your adventure begins with a smooth arrival in Kuala Lumpur, where you can check into your hotel and explore the city at your own pace. Then, get ready for an exciting Kuala Lumpur City Tour featuring iconic landmarks like the towering Petronas Twin Towers, the bustling Bukit Bintang shopping district, and the serene Sri Mahamariamman Temple.

Next, venture to Malacca for a day trip filled with rich history and colorful culture. Stroll through the ancient streets to witness the A Famosa fort, experience the lively atmosphere of Jonker Street, and enjoy a tranquil river cruise down the Melaka River. Return to Kuala Lumpur for a dose of nature and relaxation as you visit the lush KL Bird Park, wander through the beautiful Perdana Botanical Gardens, and indulge in a delightful meal at Menara KL, with its panoramic city views.

Before your departure, enjoy some last-minute shopping or sightseeing, making the most of your final moments in this dynamic city. With Travelxploria, your journey through Kuala Lumpur and Malacca will be filled with unforgettable memories and seamless experiences.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Upon arrival, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a journey through history, starting with the iconic A Famosa Fortress, a remnant of the Portuguese era. Stroll through the vibrant Jonker Street, lined with antique shops, street food stalls, and cultural gems. As the evening sets in, embark on a scenic river cruise along the Malacca River, offering breathtaking views of the city's illuminated heritage sites. Next, unwind at the Perdana Botanical Gardens, a green oasis perfect for relaxation and nature walks. In the evening, head to Menara Kuala Lumpur (KL Tower), where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will assist you in accessing the observation deck for breathtaking city views. End your journey with a luxurious dining experience at the tower’s revolving restaurant, indulging in a delightful meal while admiring Kuala Lumpur’s dazzling skyline.

packages.package_name: Enchanting Kuala Lumpur, Penang and Langkawi Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Kuala Lumpur – Petronas Towers & Batu Caves
    Kickstart your journey with a visit to the iconic Petronas Towers and explore the sacred Batu Caves.
  • Shopping & Sightseeing – Bukit Bintang, Putrajaya & KL Tower
    Shop at Bukit Bintang, admire Putrajaya’s architecture, and enjoy a stunning sunset from KL Tower.
  • Fly to Penang – George Town & Blue Mansion
    Discover George Town’s heritage, vibrant street art, and visit the iconic Blue Mansion.
  • Penang to Langkawi – Beach & Cable Car Ride
    Relax at Pantai Cenang Beach and take the Langkawi Cable Car for breathtaking island views.
  • Island Hopping & Sunset Cruise
    Explore Langkawi’s stunning islands and end the day with a relaxing Sunset Cruise.
  • Departure – Last-minute Shopping & Farewell
    Enjoy free time for shopping or sightseeing before heading to the airport for departure.

Arrive in Kuala Lumpur and Get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Let our representative from Travelxploria guide you to the best shopping spots, from luxury malls to hidden street boutiques. After a delightful lunch, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a scenic drive to Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital. Admire its futuristic architecture, the beautiful Putra Mosque, and serene lake views. As the day winds down, return to Kuala Lumpur for a magical sunset at KL Tower. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure you get priority access to the observation deck, where you can soak in breathtaking 360-degree views of the city bathed in golden hues. A perfect way to end an unforgettable day before heading back to your hotel with seamless drop-off services.

Board your flight to Penang, where our representative from Travelxploria awaits to welcome you with a seamless transfer to your hotel. Begin your journey through George Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria leading you through its vibrant streets, adorned with captivating street art and colonial-era architecture. Wander through the lively Armenian Street, stopping at iconic landmarks like Khoo Kongsi Clan House and Kapitan Keling Mosque, each reflecting the island’s rich multicultural heritage. As the sun sets, step into the enchanting world of the Blue Mansion (Cheong Fatt Tze Mansion), an architectural masterpiece showcasing Straits Chinese elegance. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria ensures a smooth and insightful visit before you’re comfortably dropped off at your hotel, reflecting on the beauty and stories of Penang’s past.

Escape to the stunning Cenang Beach with Travelxploria, where golden sands and turquoise waters create the perfect tropical retreat. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your beachside adventure. Guided by our expert travel companion, stroll along the palm-fringed shore, feeling the soft sand beneath your feet. Dive into thrilling water sports, from jet skiing to parasailing, or simply unwind with a cocktail while soaking in the breathtaking sunset. Explore lively beachfront cafes, indulge in local seafood delights, or shop for souvenirs at the nearby markets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Cenang Beach offers the best of both worlds. As the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in fiery hues, we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with memories of a truly magical seaside escape. In the afternoon, take the Langkawi Cable Car to the top of Gunung Mat Cincang for panoramic views of the island. Enjoy the scenic beauty and serenity that Langkawi offers.

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day. Afterward, unwind on a Sunset Cruise, enjoying beautiful views of the coastline as the sun sets over the Andaman Sea. It's a perfect way to relax and take in Langkawi’s natural beauty.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & City Views – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, visit KL Tower Observatory for panoramic views, and explore the Chocolate Boutique.
  • KL Highlights & Genting Excursion – Guided city tour, visit Batu Caves, and enjoy thrilling rides at Skyworld Theme Park in Genting Highlands.
  • Putrajaya & Malacca Exploration – Orientation tour of Putrajaya, drive to Malacca, enjoy a scenic river cruise, and visit the Maritime Museum.
  • Journey to Singapore & Gardens by the Bay – Drive to Singapore, explore the city with a guided tour, and visit the stunning Gardens by the Bay.
  • Bird Park & Sentosa Island Adventure – Visit Mandai Bird Park, enjoy breathtaking views from MBS Sky Park, and take a cable car ride to Sentosa Island.
  • Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium – Experience thrilling rides at Universal Studios and explore marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Board the Genting Dream Cruise – Check out from the hotel and embark on the luxurious Genting Dream Cruise for an exciting sea journey.
  • Cruise Leisure & Entertainment – Enjoy world-class amenities, pools, gourmet dining, and entertainment on board.
  • Cruise Exploration & Relaxation – Continue indulging in the cruise’s activities, fine dining, and vibrant entertainment.
  • Departure – Disembark from the cruise and head to the airport, bidding farewell to an unforgettable journey.

After a fulfilling introduction to the city, relax and settle into your hotel, gearing up for the exciting journey ahead.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Start your day with an enriching orientation tour of Putrajaya, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will introduce you to Malaysia’s administrative capital, famed for its grand architecture, serene lakes, and stunning bridges. Marvel at landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra before setting off on a scenic drive to Malacca, a city steeped in colonial history. Upon arrival, embark on a Malacca River Cruise, gliding past colorful heritage buildings, historic churches, and vibrant street art that tell tales of a bygone era. The journey continues with a visit to the Maritime Museum, where you’ll explore a life-sized replica of a Portuguese ship and learn about Malacca’s rich maritime history. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, sit back, relax, and soak in the cultural wonders of the day before heading to your next adventure.

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

packages.overview:
Kuala Lumpur – The Dynamic Capital

  • Marvel at the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, the tallest twin towers in the world.

  • Explore the vibrant shopping districts of Bukit Bintang and Central Market.

  • Visit the sacred Batu Caves, a Hindu pilgrimage site with towering limestone caves.

  • Experience the cultural mix at Merdeka Square, surrounded by colonial-era architecture.

Langkawi – The Jewel of Kedah

  • Relax on Pantai Cenang, one of Malaysia’s most stunning beaches.

  • Take a ride on the Langkawi SkyCab to enjoy breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

  • Explore the Langkawi Geopark, a UNESCO-listed natural wonder.

  • Enjoy duty-free shopping and luxury resorts for the ultimate island escape.

Malacca – A Glimpse into Malaysia’s Colonial Past

  • Walk through the Dutch Square, featuring the famous Christ Church and The Stadthuys.

  • Visit A Famosa, the remains of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress.

  • Explore Jonker Street, famous for its vibrant night market and street food.

  • Learn about Malacca’s rich history at the Baba & Nyonya Heritage Museum.

Kickstart your Kuala Lumpur adventure with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support. Begin your day at the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, marveling at the breathtaking skyline views. Next, dive into Malaysia’s rich heritage at the National Museum, home to fascinating cultural exhibits. Take a leisurely stroll through the lush KLCC Park, a refreshing green oasis in the city. Later, visit the stunning Batu Caves, a sacred Hindu site with towering limestone formations and colorful temples. Wrap up your day in Bukit Bintang, where you can shop, dine, and experience the city’s energetic nightlife before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Explore Putrajaya & Cyberjaya","day_summary":"


With Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support, enjoy a hassle-free journey to Putrajaya, Malaysia’s picturesque administrative capital. Marvel at the breathtaking Putra Mosque, an architectural masterpiece with its pink domes and serene lakeside setting. Visit the Millennium Monument, a striking obelisk symbolizing Malaysia’s growth and vision. In the afternoon, head to Cyberjaya, the country’s thriving tech hub, where innovation meets modern city planning. Explore its futuristic landscapes, vibrant tech parks, and serene green spaces before returning to your hotel. Experience the perfect mix of heritage and cutting-edge technology on this insightful day trip!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Malacca: A Journey Through Time & Heritage","day_summary":"


Embark on a seamless day trip to Malacca with Travelxploria’s expert on-ground support, ensuring smooth transfers and a hassle-free experience. Step into history at this UNESCO World Heritage Site, where colonial charm meets vibrant culture. Visit the iconic Christ Church, the red-hued Stadthuys, and the remnants of the A’Famosa Fortress, each narrating tales of Malacca’s rich past. Wander through the historic harbor and admire the blend of European and Asian influences. Immerse yourself in Peranakan culture, exploring its unique traditions and indulging in its exquisite, flavor-packed cuisine, making for an unforgettable cultural and culinary experience.

Embark on a fun-filled adventure to Johor Bahru with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support. Kickstart your day at Legoland Malaysia, where thrilling rides, interactive attractions, and a vibrant water park promise endless excitement for all ages. Feel the rush of exhilarating slides and cool off in splash-filled pools. As the sun sets, experience Johor Bahru’s lively night markets, brimming with local delicacies, unique souvenirs, and a bustling atmosphere. Stroll through the colorful stalls, savoring authentic street food while soaking in the city’s vibrant nightlife. A perfect mix of adventure, culture, and local charm awaits.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ipoh: A Blend of Heritage, Mystery & Relaxation","day_summary":"

Discover Ipoh’s colonial charm with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and top-tier on-ground support. Stroll through the historic city center, where grand heritage buildings reflect a rich past. Explore the mysterious Kellie’s Castle, an unfinished yet captivating mansion filled with intriguing history. For a refreshing escape, soak in the Lost World of Tambun’s natural hot springs, surrounded by lush greenery. Whether indulging in Ipoh’s famous street food, uncovering cultural gems, or relaxing in nature, this city offers a perfect mix of history, adventure, and tranquility for an unforgettable getaway.

Explore George Town’s vibrant streets with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support. Admire its colonial-era architecture, stunning street art, and immerse yourself in the island’s rich heritage. Indulge in Penang’s world-famous cuisine, from flavorful laksa to sizzling char kway teow, a true delight for food lovers. Step into history at the Penang Peranakan Mansion, a grand showcase of Peranakan culture, reflecting a unique blend of Chinese and Malay traditions. With its perfect mix of history, art, and gastronomy, Penang promises an unforgettable and immersive experience.

Unwind on the pristine sandy beaches, soaking in the sun and the island’s tranquil ambiance. Discover the breathtaking Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, where lush mangroves and diverse wildlife create a nature lover’s haven. Elevate your adventure with a thrilling cable car ride to Gunung Mat Cincang, followed by a walk across the Sky Bridge, offering stunning panoramic views. Whether you seek relaxation or adventure, Langkawi promises an unforgettable island escape.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European journey in Switzerland’s vibrant lakeside city.

  • Enjoy alpine adventures and explore the charming town of Lucerne.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel through the scenic Alps into Italy’s fashion capital.

  • Discover the elegance and serenity of Lake Como.

  • Arrive in the enchanting city of canals.

  • Experience Venice’s magic from the water.

  • Travel to the Renaissance heart of Italy.

  • Explore Tuscany’s most iconic gems.

  • Head to the Eternal City filled with ancient wonders.

  • Walk through Rome’s legendary ruins.

  • Discover masterpieces of art and spirituality.

  • Say goodbye with memories of a lifetime.

Arrive in Zurich, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan hub nestled along the scenic banks of the Limmat River and surrounded by alpine beauty. Upon arrival at Zurich International Airport, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time allows, head out to explore the city’s charming old town, stylish boutiques, or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Lake Zurich. From its medieval architecture to its modern urban flair, Zurich offers a perfect blend of culture, history, and natural beauty, making it an ideal starting point for your European adventure.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Zurich, giving you the perfect opportunity to explore this sophisticated Swiss city at your own pace. Begin your day with a relaxed breakfast, then consider wandering through the charming Altstadt (Old Town), where cobbled streets, historic buildings, and boutique shops create a picturesque atmosphere. Stroll along Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world’s most exclusive shopping avenues, or relax by the serene shores of Lake Zurich. You may also choose to visit museums, such as the Swiss National Museum, or take a short hike up Uetliberg Mountain for panoramic city views. The day is yours to unwind and discover.

Embark on a captivating day trip from Milan to the breathtaking Lake Como, a gem nestled at the foot of the Alps. Travel comfortably to this iconic destination, renowned for its stunning scenery, elegant villas, and charming lakeside towns. Explore the picturesque town of Como, stroll along its quaint streets, and visit the magnificent cathedral. Enjoy a scenic boat ride on the lake, passing through beautiful towns like Bellagio or Varenna. Capture postcard-perfect views of the lake and surrounding mountains. After a day immersed in natural beauty and serene elegance, return to Milan with unforgettable memories of this idyllic retreat.

Embark on an unforgettable Tuscan adventure with Travelxploria, your gateway to Italy’s most enchanting landscapes. Join our expert Travelxploria guide and best on-ground support staff as you explore the historic gems of Pisa, Siena, San Gimignano, and Chianti in a single breathtaking day. Capture the perfect photo at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, stroll through the medieval streets of Siena, and admire the grandeur of its famous Piazza del Campo. Lose yourself in the fairytale charm of San Gimignano, known for its ancient towers and artisan shops, before indulging in the rich flavors of Chianti’s world-renowned wines. From stunning architecture to rolling vineyard-covered hills, every moment is a feast for the senses. With Travelxploria, expect seamless travel, expert storytelling, and a truly immersive experience—because we don’t just plan tours, we craft unforgettable memories.

to Rome by Train ","day_summary":"

Travel from Florence to Rome aboard a high-speed train, enjoying a swift and scenic ride through the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Lazio. The journey takes approximately 1.5 hours, offering a comfortable and efficient way to transition from the artistic treasures of Florence to the timeless grandeur of Rome. Relax in your seat as you pass rolling hills, vineyards, and charming Italian towns. Upon arrival at Rome Termini Station, transfer to your hotel and settle in. Use the rest of the day to start exploring the Eternal City, rich with ancient ruins, Renaissance architecture, and vibrant local culture around every corner.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.overview:
• Touch down in Zurich and settle into the heart of Switzerland.

  • Explore Zurich’s highlights, enjoy a lake cruise, and visit the Lindt Home of Chocolate.

  • Travel to the luxurious alpine resort town of St. Moritz.

  • Embark on a scenic ride aboard the world-famous Glacier Express.

  • Journey from the Matterhorn village to the lakeside city of Geneva.

  • Discover the breathtaking beauty of the French Alps on a full-day excursion.

  • Bid farewell to Switzerland with unforgettable alpine memories.

Your Zurich adventure begins as you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, ready to guide you through this stunning Swiss city. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, immerse yourself in Zurich’s rich history, culture, and breathtaking scenery. Stroll along the famous Bahnhofstrasse, explore the charming Old Town, and soak in the tranquil beauty of Lake Zurich. Then, hop aboard a scenic boat cruise, gliding past the city’s picturesque skyline from a whole new perspective. The journey culminates at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where the secrets of Swiss chocolate-making come to life. Indulge in irresistible tastings and witness the artistry behind Switzerland’s finest confections. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—every detail is expertly handled, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience. From history to indulgence, this tour offers the perfect blend of culture, relaxation, and sweet delights.

With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, begin your adventure with a scenic village walk through Zermatt, a charming, car-free town nestled at the base of the legendary Matterhorn. packages.overview:
• Iconic Paris Landmarks: Marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Champs Elysées, Place Vendôme, and the majestic Palace of Versailles.

  • Disneyland Fun & Seine Cruise: Thrilling rides at Disney Park, and a romantic, scenic cruise along the iconic River Seine.

  • Enchanting Geneva: Explore Geneva’s landmarks like Jet d'Eau, UN Buildings, and the picturesque Flower Clock with travelxploria’s expert guide.

  • Jungfraujoch - Top of Europe: Reach 11,333 feet to experience stunning snow-covered peaks and breathtaking panoramic views of Aletsch Glacier.

  • Mt. Titlis & Lucerne: Enjoy thrilling cable car rides and captivating views from Mt. Titlis, followed by a scenic tour of Lucerne.

  • Lindt Chocolate & Rhine Falls: Discover the world of Swiss chocolate at Lindt, and witness the awe-inspiring power of Rhine Falls.

Get ready for a magical alpine journey to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a highlight of your trip with Travelxploria. Begin your day with a scenic transfer to Grindelwald Terminal, where you’ll board the new 3S-Bahn Eiger Express for a quick 15-minute ride to Eigergletscher Station. From there, hop onto a cogwheel train that takes you to the highest railway station in Europe, perched at 11,333 feet. Explore the Ice Palace, where ice artists create breathtaking masterpieces, and visit the Sphinx Observatory Deck for panoramic views of the majestic Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

Titlis & Lucerne: A Scenic Alpine Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, experience the breathtaking beauty of Mt. Titlis, reaching an exhilarating 3,020 meters with Travelxploria, your expert travel partner. Ride various cable cars, including the world’s first revolving cable car, Rotair, and enjoy a stunning 360-degree panoramic view of snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine snowy fields. Don’t miss the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge, offering unparalleled views. Later, enjoy an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of Switzerland’s most picturesque cities. Visit the Lion Monument, Kapell Brucke, and shop for Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates before embarking on a scenic cruise on Lake Lucerne.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Lindt Home of Chocolate & Rhine Falls Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, embark on a delightful journey through Switzerland and Liechtenstein. Start with a scenic ride aboard the Vaduz Mini Train, winding through the charming capital. Then, return to Zurich and immerse yourself in indulgence at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where a magnificent chocolate fountain and interactive exhibits showcase the artistry behind Swiss chocolate-making. Continue to the Rhine Falls, Europe's largest and most stunning waterfall. Take an exhilarating boat ride for a thrilling close-up of the cascading waters, creating a mesmerizing spectacle amid beautiful natural surroundings.Overnight at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bidding Farewell to Europe","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable European holiday with Travelxploria comes to an end, it’s time to bid farewell to the beautiful destinations and the wonderful new friends you’ve made. After a final breakfast, check out from your hotel and depart for the airport, carrying with you cherished memories of breathtaking landscapes, rich culture, and exceptional experiences. This European adventure will remain in your heart for a lifetime. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for your next unforgettable journey!

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

Thank you Riya madam and Sanjib da for planning our tour so wonderful.

I would definitely plan my upcoming tour with TravelXploria.
